gate_runs.detail: Audited 3 pure block-logic modules: blockedPeers.ts (100%, 1 real gap closed by boundary test), blockContactAction.ts (100%), processContactInput.ts (93.75%, 4 equivalent residuals). SCOPED: JSX-heavy/huge files (ContactChat/contacts/profile/add.tsx, MarmotContext.tsx, DirectMessageNotificationsWatcher.tsx, i18n.ts, BlockContactButton.tsx) NOT mutation-audited — mutation noise dominates signal (skill SKIP guidance); their test quality validated by per-story examiners + 2-vendor review + behavioral test-hardening round.
dm-block-contact.spec.ts 5/5 + groups-contacts.spec.ts 1/1 green; clean run, no flakes.

Stage1 Opus clean over whole tree + convergence verify (caught reaction-wipe case regression). Stage2 independent Fable cold pass (substituting for broken Codex sandbox) found 5 cross-epic outbound-privacy leaks; all remediated; final Fable pass clean.
